snapshot.scope: Manual H2 review binds public and owner documentation, traceability controls, verifier code and the executable SourceRecord schema to the exact production boundary review; automated gates cover implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: H2 unified Agent ingress, legacy ingest compatibility and renderer proposal containment review
reviewers.independence: The reviewer did not author the H2 code or Planning corrections, edited only this review recipe after independently comparing the uncommitted candidate with baseline 2636ea6639e6e4fc08aa0c27a352a7ee2252baa1, and first rejected the candidate until three documentation and traceability blockers were corrected.

dimensions.summary: README and the existing architecture, Pi, Job, IPC, prompt, domain, playbook and decision owners now expose one coherent H2 route: agent.submitTurn for new semantics, typed legacy compatibility, Main-only proposal recovery and a future bounded renderer projection.

The documents match production code: current SourceRecord writes require agent_turn or capture_only, absent historical fields normalize to legacy_agent_ingest, Pi selects source tools, legacy auto-chain is exact-marker-only, capture handlers are absent, and all four proposal renderer methods fail closed.

EV-PROPOSAL-UI and the unsafe safe-summary claim are retired; PIGE-JOB-003 and E7.01 remain partial with bounded preview and decision explicitly open, while E3.09 remains incomplete and no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.

The migration boundary is executable and reviewable: Main preserves historical proposal and agent_ingest recovery, new Agent turns cannot stage the legacy proposal, deterministic capability children cannot choose successors, and H3/H4 remain named open work.

No new owner document was added. Planning corrected the existing public, domain, Job and traceability owners, semantic hashes were refreshed mechanically, and the seven H2 owner documents retain subject-specific detail without duplicating raw proposal DTOs.

verification.evidence: Independent focused review passed 6 files and 168 tests covering typed SourceRecord migration, removed capture handlers, all-four proposal fail-closed behavior, legacy/new Job routing, Pi-owned evidence ordering and current source OCR flow.

The responsibility gate reports H2 removal or containment of renderer capture submission, new legacy auto-chain, terminal repair and poison, Home modality and Host order controls, plus all legacy renderer proposal methods.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, parser manifests, PRD contract and 91-entry Decision Log checks pass on the corrected current H2 documentation snapshot.

verification.command: Independent code and traceability review against 2636ea6639e6e4fc08aa0c27a352a7ee2252baa1
verification.evidence: Production and governed-resource diffs confirm no Requirement, Exit or Phase promotion; proposal UI evidence is removed, raw model summary/reason/path claims are Main-only, and the renderer boundary remains body-free and unavailable.

coordination.taskTitle: H2 unified AgentTurn and ingest capability convergence
coordination.compatibility: H2 stops new legacy ingest orchestration and unsafe renderer proposal access while retaining exact historical SourceRecord, Job, proposal, Operation and recovery compatibility inside Main.
coordination.acknowledgement: Planning corrected the existing public, domain, Job, acceptance and semantic-claim owners after independent review; Development code remains uncommitted, H3/H4 stay serialized open work, and status projections remain unchanged.

nonBlockingRisks: Historical legacy_agent_ingest Jobs and durable proposals remain Main-internal compatibility state for a bounded migration window; H3/H4 must retire or migrate them without creating new records.

The preload type surface still names legacy proposal methods, but Main rejects list/get/approve/reject before any durable DTO crosses to renderer; removal or replacement awaits the bounded safe contract.

A future proposal UI requires localized summary and warning keys, bounded diff lines and opaque identities; it must not revive ConfirmationProposal, model summary/reason, paths, content, base hashes or Operation internals.
H3 still owns the unique JobExecutionCoordinator and H4 owns legacy retrieval answer retirement plus threat-model-reviewed durable primitive convergence.
Windows/Linux qualification remains deferred and unclaimed; Requirement, Exit and Phase statuses are unchanged.
